purpose: Execute exactly one same-geometry CdTe response diagnostic to determine whether the failed acoustic, Born-charge and ASR gates are primarily numerical.

decision_policy.if_all_three_violations_collapse: record that numerical response controls materially affect the failed A0 gates; require a separate decision before A1 or any broader convergence work
decision_policy.if_violations_do_not_all_collapse: record that ecutrho/tr2 tightening is insufficient; stop and reassess volume/pseudopotential/response formulation analytically before any further compute

claim_boundary: This single comparison can identify whether two declared numerical controls materially reduce the failed response diagnostics. It cannot establish converged phonons, dielectric response, Born charges, a reference gap, equilibrium volume, A1 readiness, or a material prediction.
